metadata.name: PO-33 K.O.
metadata.description: Pocket-sized micro sampler with 40 seconds of sample memory, 8 melodic and 8 drum sounds, 16 patterns, 16 effects, and built-in microphone.

tooltip.title: LCD Display
tooltip.description: Shows current sound number, pattern number, BPM, step position, and various status indicators. The display changes based on the current mode.
tooltip.tip: Watch the display for visual feedback during sampling and pattern editing.

tooltip.title: Sound Button
tooltip.description: Hold and turn Knob A to select sound slots (1-16). The orange ring indicates this is a primary control. Upper sounds (1-8) are melodic, lower sounds (9-16) are drums.
tooltip.tip: Press sound + turn Knob A for quick sound selection. Hold sound + turn Knob B for secondary parameters.

tooltip.title: Pattern Button
tooltip.description: Hold and turn Knob A to select patterns (1-16). Each pattern stores a unique sequence that can be up to 16 steps long.
tooltip.tip: Patterns can be chained together for longer sequences. Hold pattern + turn Knob B for pattern copy.

tooltip.title: BPM Button
tooltip.description: Hold and turn Knob A to adjust tempo (60-240 BPM). The 'm' indicates meter/time signature mode when combined with Knob B.
tooltip.tip: Hold bpm + turn Knob B to change the meter (steps per bar): 16, 12, 8, or 4.

tooltip.title: Knob A
tooltip.description: Primary rotary encoder. Turn while holding sound, pattern, or bpm buttons to adjust their values. Also used for trim, pitch, and filter adjustments.
tooltip.tip: Knob A is the main value knob - it's used with most button combinations for primary adjustments.

tooltip.title: Knob B
tooltip.description: Secondary rotary encoder. Turn while holding buttons for secondary parameters like filter, pitch, volume, and pan adjustments.
tooltip.tip: Knob B handles secondary parameters - try holding sound + turning Knob B for filter control.

tooltip.title: Pad 1 (Melodic)
tooltip.description: Triggers melodic sound slot 1. Melodic sounds can be played chromatically - press multiple pads to change pitch.
tooltip.tip: In write mode, this triggers step 1 of the current pattern.

tooltip.title: Pad 2 (Melodic)
tooltip.description: Triggers melodic sound slot 2. Melodic sounds can be played chromatically.
tooltip.tip: In write mode, this triggers step 2 of the current pattern.

tooltip.title: Pad 3 (Melodic)
tooltip.description: Triggers melodic sound slot 3. Melodic sounds can be played chromatically.
tooltip.tip: In write mode, this triggers step 3 of the current pattern.

tooltip.title: Pad 4 (Melodic)
tooltip.description: Triggers melodic sound slot 4. Melodic sounds can be played chromatically.
tooltip.tip: In write mode, this triggers step 4 of the current pattern.

tooltip.title: Pad 5 (Melodic)
tooltip.description: Triggers melodic sound slot 5. Melodic sounds can be played chromatically.
tooltip.tip: In write mode, this triggers step 5 of the current pattern.

tooltip.title: Pad 6 (Melodic)
tooltip.description: Triggers melodic sound slot 6. Melodic sounds can be played chromatically.
tooltip.tip: In write mode, this triggers step 6 of the current pattern.

tooltip.title: Pad 7 (Melodic)
tooltip.description: Triggers melodic sound slot 7. Melodic sounds can be played chromatically.
tooltip.tip: In write mode, this triggers step 7 of the current pattern.

tooltip.title: Pad 8 (Melodic)
tooltip.description: Triggers melodic sound slot 8. Melodic sounds can be played chromatically.
tooltip.tip: In write mode, this triggers step 8 of the current pattern.

tooltip.title: Pad 9 (Drum)
tooltip.description: Triggers drum sound slot 9. Drum sounds play at fixed pitch, optimized for percussion.
tooltip.tip: In write mode, this triggers step 9 of the current pattern.

tooltip.title: Pad 10 (Drum)
tooltip.description: Triggers drum sound slot 10. Drum sounds play at fixed pitch.
tooltip.tip: In write mode, this triggers step 10 of the current pattern.

tooltip.title: Pad 11 (Drum)
tooltip.description: Triggers drum sound slot 11. Drum sounds play at fixed pitch.
tooltip.tip: In write mode, this triggers step 11 of the current pattern.

tooltip.title: Pad 12 (Drum)
tooltip.description: Triggers drum sound slot 12. Drum sounds play at fixed pitch.
tooltip.tip: In write mode, this triggers step 12 of the current pattern.

tooltip.title: Pad 13 (Drum)
tooltip.description: Triggers drum sound slot 13. Drum sounds play at fixed pitch.
tooltip.tip: In write mode, this triggers step 13 of the current pattern.

tooltip.title: Pad 14 (Drum)
tooltip.description: Triggers drum sound slot 14. Drum sounds play at fixed pitch.
tooltip.tip: In write mode, this triggers step 14 of the current pattern.

tooltip.title: Pad 15 (Drum)
tooltip.description: Triggers drum sound slot 15. Drum sounds play at fixed pitch.
tooltip.tip: In write mode, this triggers step 15 of the current pattern.

tooltip.title: Pad 16 (Drum)
tooltip.description: Triggers drum sound slot 16. Drum sounds play at fixed pitch.
tooltip.tip: In write mode, this triggers step 16 of the current pattern.

tooltip.title: Record Button
tooltip.description: Arms recording mode. In sample mode, records audio from mic or line input. In write mode, records pad hits to the sequencer in real-time.
tooltip.tip: Hold record + turn Knob A to access trim mode. Hold record + turn Knob B to adjust sample start point.

tooltip.title: FX Button
tooltip.description: Activates punch-in effects. Hold FX and press pads 1-16 to apply different effects. Each pad triggers a unique effect.
tooltip.tip: Effects include stutter, loop, scratch, filter sweep, and more. Release to stop the effect.

tooltip.title: Play Button
tooltip.description: Starts and stops pattern playback. Press once to play, press again to stop.
tooltip.tip: Hold play + turn Knob A to enter pattern chain mode for arranging multiple patterns.

tooltip.title: Write Button
tooltip.description: Toggles write mode for step-sequencing. In write mode, pads enter notes at the current step. Use Knob A to navigate steps.
tooltip.tip: Hold write + pad to delete that sound from the current step.

tooltip.title: Lock Switch
tooltip.description: Prevents accidental button presses. When locked, only the play button and knobs function.
tooltip.tip: Use lock when performing live to prevent accidental changes.

tooltip.title: Line Output / Sync (3.5mm)
tooltip.description: Stereo 3.5mm jack on the top-right edge. Outputs audio and sync signal. Left channel is sync clock (8 PPQ), right channel is audio. Located on the back of the unit.
tooltip.tip: Use a stereo cable for headphones, or a Y-splitter to separate sync and audio for chaining Pocket Operators.

tooltip.title: Line Input (3.5mm)
tooltip.description: Mono 3.5mm input on the top-left edge for sampling from external audio sources. Located on the back of the unit, facing outward.
tooltip.tip: For best quality, sample from line input rather than the built-in microphone. Disables mic when connected.

tooltip.title: Built-in Microphone
tooltip.description: Internal electret microphone (red icon in top-right corner) for sampling ambient sounds, voice, and instruments without external gear.
tooltip.tip: For cleaner samples, use the line input. The mic is great for quick ideas and lo-fi character.
